# seerr_api_request (Data Source)

Execute arbitrary Seerr API requests and return the response.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_api_request" "status" {
  path   = "/api/v1/status"
  method = "GET"
}

output "status_body" {
  value = data.seerr_api_request.status.response_body_json
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Endpoint path or absolute URL.

### Optional

- `headers` (Map of String) Extra request headers.
- `method` (String) HTTP method used for the request.
- `request_body_json` (String) Optional JSON request body.

### Read-Only

- `response_body_json` (String) Raw JSON response body.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
